verses.text: Pethuel' tapa Joel tungah hih bangin Topa' thu hong tung hi
No khangham zawdiakte aw, ngai un; Judah gammi khempeuh aw, na bil uh ngat un. Note' khan'sung ahi a, na pu na pate uh khan'sung ahi zongin, hih bang thu piang ngei peuhmah ahi hiam
Hih thute khempeuh na tate uh kiangah gen un la, na tate un amau' tate' tungah na gensawn uh hen la, amaute in a khangsawnte tungah na gensawn leuleu uh hen
A pettan kauphete' nek bangteng, kauphe honte in netum a, kauphe honte' nek bangteng, a tuan kauphete in netum a, a tuan kauphete' nek bangteng, a susia kauphete in nemang khin uh hi
No zukhamte aw, tho un la kap un. No leenggahzu nete aw, thumin tau un. Na zunek ding teng uh beimang khinta hi
Kauphe honpi in i gam hong sim a, amaute tam mahmah uh a, hat mahmah uh hi. A ha uh humpinelkai ha bangin hiam a, humpinelkaipi ha bangin gupha mahmah hi
Amaute in i leengguiteng susiamang khin a, i theikungteng khempeuh netummang khin uh hi. A hawng khempeuh netum uh a, a hiangte kang sengsang hi
Nungak khat, a ten'pih ding a lawmpa in a sihsan ciangin a kah bangin note zong kapin thum un
Topa' biakinn-ah biakna-in piak ding an leh leenggahzu om nawnlo a, Topa' na a sem siampite thumin a tau uh hi
Lo ante kisusia a, leengguite keutum hi. Oliv kungte keugaw a, lolai-ah bangmah om nawnlo ahih manin leitang lungzuangin a thum hi
Lokhote aw, dah un; leenggui ciingte aw, kap un; mangbuh leh mangbuhham, lo an khempeuh a beita hi
Leengguite keu a, theikungte vuai ta hi. Mang kawlsingte, nisuhte, epel kungte-a kipan singkung khempeuh keumang khin hi. Mihingte a lungdamna dingteng zong a maimang ta hi

Siampite aw, puanhampi silhin kap un; biakna tau-a nasemte aw, thumin tau un. Ka Pasian' na a semte aw, biakinn sungah tum un la, zanthapai-in dahna lim puanhampi silh un. Note' Pasian' biakinn sungah piak ding an leh leenggahzu khat zong om nawnlo hi
An tan' ding thu pia un la, a thupi biak kikhopna bawl un. Note' Topa Pasian' biakinn sungah makaite leh gammi khempeuh kaikhawm un la, Topa' tungah kiko-in thum un
Kalai! A hun hong naita! Topa' ni hong naita a, Vanglianpa' suksiatna hun hong naita hi
Eima muh mahmahin lo ante kisusia a, eite' Pasian' biakinn sungah lungdamna a beita hi
Guahtui omlo ahih manin khai kituhte khempeuh leisungah keucip a, an khol ding bangmah om nawnlo ahih manin ansalte khempeuh a vekin kisia khinta hi
A gilkial tuu leh bawngte cimawhin tau uh a, lonona mun om nawn hetlo ahih manin ganhing honte cimawh uh a, tuuhonte in zong haksatna thuak uh hi
Topa aw, nangma tungah kong kiko hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mei in a kattum tawh kibangin, lonona leitang khempeuh leh singkung khempeuh keumang khinta hi
Luitui luang khempeuh kangcip khinta a, mei' kattum bangin lonona khempeuh keucip khin ahih manin nangma tungah gamsate nangawn hong kiko uh hi.
